---
title: "Competitions"
subtitle: "my data science portfolio"
---

I participate in hackathons and data science competitions to solve challenging problems under tight deadlines. These experiences help me sharpen my skills, collaborate effectively, and create impactful solutions.

---

## My Competition Approach

- Quickly understand the problem and define goals  
- Clean and explore data efficiently  
- Apply machine learning or data engineering as needed  
- Communicate results through clear visualizations and reports  
- Collaborate effectively in team-based environments

---

## Featured Competitions

### HackUSU 2026 - Data App Factory (2nd Place)
**Goal:** Build a secure analytics platform to convert natural language into SQL queries.  
**What I Did:**  
- Developed a Streamlit-based platform with AI-assisted SQL  
- Implemented role-based access controls for secure data handling  
- Collaborated in a 17-hour sprint to produce a polished solution  
**Outcome:** 2nd place in a fast-paced, high-stakes hackathon  

[View Project]

---

## Why Competitions Matter

Competitions let me apply my **data science and software engineering skills under pressure**, explore new technologies, and deliver practical solutions quickly. They also show **collaboration, problem-solving, and creativity**—key skills for any data scientist.
